---
title: "County Health Rankings & Roadmaps"
categories:
  - "Health Outcomes"
data_description: "Provides information on health outcomes and health factors for all 50 states"
data_time_frame: "Year; 2010 to 2024"
data_spatial_scale: "County"
data_format: "CSV and Shapefiles"
data_source: "Robert Wood Johnson Foundation and the University of Wisconsin Population Health Initiative"
data_orig_repo: "[2010 to 2023](https://www.countyhealthrankings.org/health-data/methodology-and-sources/data-documentation/national-data-documentation-2010-2022) [2024 or 2025](https://www.countyhealthrankings.org/health-data/methodology-and-sources/data-documentation)"
data_living_atlas: "[2018](https://www.arcgis.com/home/item.html?id=c2d611adace94b488bfbf280dd591a7c) [2019 to 2025](https://www.arcgis.com/home/search.html?restrict=false&sortField=relevance&sortOrder=desc&searchTerm=owner%3A%22esri_demographics%22+&tags=county+health+rankings#content)"
data_details: |
  This dataset offers county level estimates of health outcomes and risk factors. Estimates help identify ares requiring improvement and guide the creation and use of effective, focused health interventions. As a result of the difficulty in finding local intervention effects, users should be careful when using these figures to judge programs or policies.
format:
  html:
    template: ../../assets/data_catalog/data_template.html
---
